scripts.smoke: set NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_THEMATIC_WARMUP=1&& npm run build && playwright test
scripts.smoke:headed: set NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_THEMATIC_WARMUP=1&& npm run build && playwright test --headed
scripts.smoke:integration: set NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_THEMATIC_WARMUP=1&& npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.integration.config.ts --workers=1
scripts.smoke:integration:headed: set NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_THEMATIC_WARMUP=1&& npm run build && playwright test -c playwright.integration.config.ts --workers=1 --headed
